message:
fix(daemon): recursive dir_size_estimate and remove dead coordinator (bd-2ax,bd-1cv)

- dir_size_estimate now walks up to 4 levels deep and 500 entries instead
  of only summing immediate children metadata, giving much more accurate
  size estimates for nested artifact directories (bd-2ax)
- Remove unused ShutdownCoordinator dummy tasks that always returned true
  while real thread joining happened independently after (bd-1cv)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
